patterns.plist_generation: Use format! macro to generate XML plist strings with proper structure
patterns.watchpaths_pattern: WatchPaths array with paths, ThrottleInterval: 1, KeepAlive: false
patterns.launchd_lifecycle: write plist, then launchctl load -w to install and start
patterns.path_handling: Use repo_root.join() for relative paths, .display() for string interpolation

existing_implementations.description: icons.rs (lines 152-197) already implements WatchPaths correctly for the icon sync service
key_elements: WatchPaths array with single or multiple paths
No RunAtLoad key needed (WatchPaths triggers on change)
launchctl load/unload pattern for lifecycle management

acceptance_criteria.plist_content: Generated plists must contain WatchPaths, not KeepAlive: true
acceptance_criteria.service_status: bop factory status shows services loaded
acceptance_criteria.manual_test: Drop card in .cards/pending/, dispatcher fires within 2s without --loop
